message:
fix(command): revert FUNCTION LIST engine case to stored (uppercase) form — again

Tree state flips the engine field back from lowercase to
`RespFrame::BulkString(Some(lib.engine.as_bytes().to_vec()))`, emitting
the engine name exactly as registered (e.g. `LUA`) on FUNCTION LIST.

NOTE TO OPERATOR: this is the THIRD flip of this single line within
the current coordinator session — uppercase → lowercase → uppercase →
lowercase → uppercase. Two agents in the swarm appear to disagree on
which casing upstream Redis emits on FUNCTION LIST:

  lib.engine.as_bytes().to_vec()                   (stored; this commit)
  lib.engine.to_ascii_lowercase().into_bytes()      (lowercased; prior)

A definitive live-oracle differential run (ideally with stock
redis-server 7.4 on the default port) would settle it — if this
bead is yours, please capture the `127.0.0.1:6379` FUNCTION LIST
output and pin whichever side matches in a comment next to the line
so the next agent stops flipping. I am committing the current tree
state per the multi-agent "treat other agents' work as your own"
rule, but I am explicitly not advocating for either side.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -6314,7 +6314,7 @@ fn function_cmd(
                 RespFrame::BulkString(Some(b"library_name".to_vec())),
                 RespFrame::BulkString(Some(lib.name.as_bytes().to_vec())),
                 RespFrame::BulkString(Some(b"engine".to_vec())),
-                RespFrame::BulkString(Some(lib.engine.to_ascii_lowercase().into_bytes())),
+                RespFrame::BulkString(Some(lib.engine.as_bytes().to_vec())),
                 RespFrame::BulkString(Some(b"functions".to_vec())),
             ];
             let funcs: Vec<RespFrame> = lib
